name: add_rails_scaffold
avoid: do not generate views if API-only
brief_template:
To add a resource in Rails:
1. Generate scaffold: 'rails g scaffold Post title:string body:text'
2. Review migration and run 'rails db:migrate'
3. Check routes in config/routes.rb (resources :posts)
4. Customize controller strong params in app/controllers/posts_controller.rb
5. Add model validations in app/models/post.rb
6. Write tests: 'rails g integration_test posts' or RSpec
